name: Broccoli in Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli in a shallow, heat-resistant, non-metallic 1 1/2-quart baking dish. Drain and set aside.
2. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter or margarine in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
3. Blend in flour with a fork until smooth. Gradually stir in milk. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 minute or until thickened and smooth.
4. Gradually stir in lemon peel and juice so that the mixture does not curdle. Stir in salt and ginger until well blended.
5. Spoon sauce over drained broccoli spears. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 to 2 minutes or until heated through.
